mission: Help parents make realistic family-trip decisions through trustworthy destination tools and evidence-aware planning guidance.
release_policy: Follow the existing independent-review, exact-path, QA, direct-main, deployment, and production-verification gates in AGENTS.md.

local_dependencies.name: semrush
local_dependencies.fallback: Use the latest normalized import, label freshness, and continue when Semrush is not required evidence.
